homeLayout.content: Browse an even bigger Gamers Arena catalog with 12,000+ game listings, stronger search results, and faster browsing.
Missing a title like Wukong or any other game? Search for it and customers now get a Telegram request button instantly.
Admin can still manage QR payment, bundles, blog posts, titles, and homepage content from one dashboard.
